# rxsim

The goal of rxsim is to reduce friction in simulating randomized
clinical trials (RCT).

## Installation

You can install the development version of rxsim from
[GitHub](https://github.com/Boehringer-Ingelheim/rxsim) with:

``` r
install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("Boehringer-Ingelheim/rxsim")
```

## Usage

Checkout the vignette that shows a basic example:

``` r
vignette("example-usecase", package="rxsim")
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`Population`](https://boehringer-ingelheim.github.io/rxsim/reference/Population.md)
  : Population: Manage a patient population
- [`Timer`](https://boehringer-ingelheim.github.io/rxsim/reference/Timer.md)
  : Timer: Track timed events and apply condition-triggered analyses
- [`Trial`](https://boehringer-ingelheim.github.io/rxsim/reference/Trial.md)
  : Trial: Simulate a multi‑arm clinical trial
- [`add_timepoints()`](https://boehringer-ingelheim.github.io/rxsim/reference/add_timepoints.md)
  : Add Timepoints to a Timer
- [`clone_trial()`](https://boehringer-ingelheim.github.io/rxsim/reference/clone_trial.md)
  : Clone a Trial Object Multiple Times
- [`gen_plan()`](https://boehringer-ingelheim.github.io/rxsim/reference/gen_plan.md)
  : Generate Trial Enrollment and Dropout Plan
- [`gen_population()`](https://boehringer-ingelheim.github.io/rxsim/reference/gen_population.md)
  : Generate a Population Object
- [`gen_timepoints()`](https://boehringer-ingelheim.github.io/rxsim/reference/gen_timepoints.md)
  : Generate Piecewise-Linear Enrollment and Dropout Plan
- [`get_col_names()`](https://boehringer-ingelheim.github.io/rxsim/reference/get_col_names.md)
  : Extract Column Names from Populations
- [`prettify_results()`](https://boehringer-ingelheim.github.io/rxsim/reference/prettify_results.md)
  : Format Trial Results as a Data Frame
- [`replicate_trial()`](https://boehringer-ingelheim.github.io/rxsim/reference/replicate_trial.md)
  : Create Multiple Trials with Generated Populations
- [`run_trials()`](https://boehringer-ingelheim.github.io/rxsim/reference/run_trials.md)
  : Run Multiple Trial Objects
- [`trigger_by_calendar()`](https://boehringer-ingelheim.github.io/rxsim/reference/trigger_by_calendar.md)
  : Trigger Analysis at a Calendar Time
- [`trigger_by_fraction()`](https://boehringer-ingelheim.github.io/rxsim/reference/trigger_by_fraction.md)
  : Trigger Analysis at a Sample Fraction
- [`vector_to_dataframe()`](https://boehringer-ingelheim.github.io/rxsim/reference/vector_to_dataframe.md)
  : Convert Vector to Population Data Frame

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [Example 1: Two arm \| Fixed design \|
  Continuous](https://boehringer-ingelheim.github.io/rxsim/articles/example-1.md):
- [Example 2: Two arm \| Interim \| Continuous \|
  t-test](https://boehringer-ingelheim.github.io/rxsim/articles/example-2.md):
- [Example 3: Two arm \| Fixed design \| Two correlated continuous
  endpoints \|
  t-test](https://boehringer-ingelheim.github.io/rxsim/articles/example-3.md):
- [Example 4: Two arm \| Fixed design \| Correlated continuous &
  time-to-event endpoints \| t-test + survival
  analysis](https://boehringer-ingelheim.github.io/rxsim/articles/example-4.md):
- [Example 5: Multi-arm \| Fixed design \| Single continuous endpoint \|
  Dunnett test +
  MCP-Mod](https://boehringer-ingelheim.github.io/rxsim/articles/example-5.md):
- [Example 6: Two-arm \| Fixed design \| Single continuous endpoint \|
  Overall + exploratory subgroup
  analysis](https://boehringer-ingelheim.github.io/rxsim/articles/example-6.md):
- [Example 7: Two-arm \| Fixed design \| Single continuous endpoint \|
  Bayesian Go/No-Go with placebo
  borrowing](https://boehringer-ingelheim.github.io/rxsim/articles/example-7.md):
- [Example 8: Seamless Ph2a/2b \| Two-arm -\> Multi-arm \| Single
  continuous endpoint \| Bayesian Go/No-Go + Bayesian
  MCP-Mod](https://boehringer-ingelheim.github.io/rxsim/articles/example-8.md):
- [Example Multi Run: Two arm \| Interim \| Continuous \|
  t-test](https://boehringer-ingelheim.github.io/rxsim/articles/example-multi-run.md):
- [Example
  usecase](https://boehringer-ingelheim.github.io/rxsim/articles/example-usecase.md):
- [Getting
  Started](https://boehringer-ingelheim.github.io/rxsim/articles/getting-started.md):
